description.p: Wezmux is a workspace-aware terminal for multi-agent workflows, built on top of WezTerm's terminal emulator, GUI, and multiplexer foundation.
It adds a persistent sidebar for workspace metadata such as git status, pull requests, listening ports, notifications, and coding-agent state.
Configuration is still expressed using Lua, and the inherited WezTerm terminal stack provides panes, tabs, SSH/multiplexer support, hyperlinks, and modern rendering behavior.

screenshot.caption: Workspace-aware terminal layout with sidebar metadata

description.p: Initial Wezmux release planning metadata. Public `v1.0` support is currently macOS-only while the inherited upstream cross-platform packaging is being adapted to Wezmux.
